# Carrusel de imagenes SERP (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: azp-xxi-rw6.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/hotel/es/bcn-urbaness-del-comte_barcelona
2. Click View all (101) images
3. Click View all (102) rooms images
4. Click ChevronRightIcon to navigate forward
5. Click ChevronRightIcon to navigate forward
6. Click ChevronRightIcon to navigate forward
7. Click Comprueba disponibilidad button
